property.name: label
property.label: Label
property.description: Label shown above the upload area

property.name: imageSlot
property.label: Image Slot
property.description: For Needs_Offers__c only: which image slot (1-4)

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record ID
property.description: ID of the record to attach image to

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: API name of the object (Contact, Story__c, Library_Item__c, Needs_Offers__c)

property.name: label
property.label: Label
property.description: Label shown above the upload area

property.name: imageSlot
property.label: Image Slot
property.description: For Needs_Offers__c only: which image slot (1-4)
